–2. A tribe of Israel
  .Prophecy concerningGe 49:25,26;Isa 7;9:18-21;11:13;28:1;Jer 31;Ho 5:14;Zec 9:10;10:7
  .Numbered at Mount Sinai and in plains of MoabNu 1:33;26:37

  .Rebuked Gideon for not summoning them to join the war against 
the MidianitesJud 8:1

  .Their jealousy of JephthahJud 12:1
  .Defeated by himJud 12:4-6
  .Received Ish-bosheth as king2Sa 2:9
  .Jeroboam set up a golden calf in Beth-el1Ki 12:29
  .Revolted from house of David1Ki 12:25;2Ch 10:16
  .Some of tribe joined Judah
